human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for planning-boundary separation, cross-industry evidence framing, routing policy, capacity-risk logic, and research-pack completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: The manifest defines a narrow planning-scheduling specialization with explicit adjacent-lane and approval boundaries.
Authoritative sources include NERC reliability standards and RTO outage-coordination references relevant to generation maintenance planning.
Functionality coverage includes all required shared, workflow-phase, and cross-industry abilities with scenario mapping.
Evaluation scenarios and results cover demand overrun, conflict escalation, adjacent-lane routing, jurisdiction gaps, terminology normalization, and no-final-approval behavior.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in this package draft.
All scenario results remain aligned with required ability coverage checks.

notes: This validated package is suitable as a planning-only generator maintenance recommendation specialist.
Runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted trusted built implementation is approved.
